defaults.description: Applied Computer Science student and full-stack builder focused on practical web applications, software architecture, data projects, and self-hosting.

home.title: Home
home.description: Explore selected projects, experience, blog posts, and contact details from the portfolio of Alex van Poppel.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Browse practical software, web, and data projects built by Alex van Poppel, with technology filters and featured work.

blog.title: Blog posts
blog.description: Read notes on portfolio building, architecture, client workshops, hardware, and software lessons from current and past projects.

blogPost.title: Blog post
blogPost.description: Read an article from the portfolio blog of Alex van Poppel.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Use the contact form or public links to get in touch about internships, freelance work, collaboration, or portfolio questions.

stats.title: Stats
stats.description: View GitHub contribution activity, portfolio views, and engagement metrics from the public portfolio.

assistant.title: Portfolio Assistant
assistant.description: Ask the portfolio assistant about projects, blog posts, experience, and the overall site.

errors.load: Homepage content could not be loaded from the portfolio API. Make sure the API or reverse proxy is running.

empty.notReadyTitle: Homepage content is not ready yet
empty.notReadyDescription: Publish hero, featured, and profile content in the CMS to populate the public homepage.

errors.load: Projects could not be loaded from the portfolio API. Make sure the API or reverse proxy is running.

empty.noneDescription: Publish a project in the CMS to populate this page and its featured spotlight card.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try another search term or clear some technology filters to bring the rest of the portfolio projects back into view.

filters.helper: Choose one or more technologies to narrow the project list.

featured.title: A highlighted project from the current collection

errors.load: Blog posts could not be loaded from the portfolio API. Make sure the API or reverse proxy is running.

empty.noneTitle: No blog posts are published yet
empty.noneDescription: Publish a blog post in the CMS to populate this page and its featured article slot.
empty.noMatchTitle: No blog posts match that search
empty.noMatchDescription: Try another keyword or switch back to a broader topic to browse the rest of the articles.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, excerpts, tags, or markdown content
filters.helper: Choose one or more topics to narrow the article list.

featured.title: A highlighted post from the current collection

errors.load: This blog post could not be loaded from the portfolio API.

contact.intro: Whether you're reaching out about an internship, a project, or just want to talk tech, feel free to use whichever channel suits you best.

errors.submit: The message could not be sent to the portfolio API. Make sure the API or reverse proxy is running and try again.
errors.profileLoad: Contact details could not be loaded from the portfolio API. You can still use the form below.

validation.messageRequired: Please describe what you would like to discuss.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.nameMinLength: Name should be at least 2 characters.
validation.subjectMinLength: Subject should be at least 4 characters.
validation.messageMinLength: Message should be at least 20 characters so there is enough context.

empty.noDetailsTitle: Contact details have not been published yet
empty.noDetailsDescription: You can still use the form, but the profile does not currently expose any public contact information.

info.title: Start with the channel that feels easiest

form.title: Contact form
form.description: I'm also open and available for discussing new opportunities! Send in a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me what you have in mind.

success.title: Thanks, {{name}}.
success.description: Your message about {{subject}} was sent to the portfolio API and stored successfully.

errors.load: Stats could not be loaded from the portfolio API. Make sure the API or reverse proxy is running.
errors.like: Your like could not be saved right now. Please try again in a moment.

empty.noDataDescription: Publish a GitHub snapshot or portfolio analytics summary to populate this page.

github.title: GitHub Stats
github.description: Insights and metrics about my GitHub portfolio.
github.boardDescription: Last 12 months of commits and contribution activity.

portfolio.title: About this portfolio
portfolio.description: Insights and metrics about my portfolio website.

checking.label: Checking availability
checking.detail: Looking up the assistant status and retrieving the latest portfolio context.

ready.label: Ready
ready.detail: The assistant can answer with live portfolio context.

fallback.label: Fallback mode
fallback.detail: Live retrieval is limited right now, but the assistant can still answer from the available portfolio snapshot.
fallback.extra: Answers may be less detailed until the full assistant stack is available again.

preview.label: Preview mode
preview.detail: The assistant is running in preview mode with limited retrieval coverage.

offline.label: Offline
offline.detail: The assistant service is unavailable right now.
offline.extra: You can still browse the portfolio manually or try again in a moment.

empty.intro: Ask about projects, blog posts, experience, technologies, or what this portfolio includes.
empty.promptsLabel: Try one of these starter prompts:

starterPrompts.projects: Which projects best show Alex's strongest work?
starterPrompts.blog: What are the main themes in the blog posts?
starterPrompts.specialities: What technologies and specialties show up most often?

composer.label: Message the portfolio assistant
composer.placeholder: Ask a question about the portfolio…

hints.fallback: Fallback mode is active. Answers may be shorter or less specific.
hints.offline: The assistant is offline right now.

errors.rateLimited: The assistant is temporarily rate limited. Please try again in a moment.
errors.lostReply: The reply could not be completed.
errors.pollFailed: The assistant reply could not be refreshed.
errors.sendFailed: The message could not be sent.
errors.timeout: The assistant took too long to respond.
